title: Prescriptive CycloneDX BOM Schema v1.6 (Derived from ECMA-424 Spec)
description: A comprehensive and prescriptive JSON schema for the CycloneDX Bill of Materials (BOM) specification v1.6, derived directly from the normative language of the ECMA-424 standard. This schema enforces all REQUIRED/MUST constraints and embeds all RECOMMENDED/SHOULD best practices in descriptions.

bomFormat.description: Specifies the format of the BOM. The bomFormat property is Required, and its value MUST be 'CycloneDX'.

specVersion.description: The version of the CycloneDX specification the BOM conforms to. The specVersion property is Required, and for this schema, the value MUST be '1.6'.

serialNumber.description: A unique serial number for the BOM. If specified, it MUST conform to RFC 4122 (urn:uuid:*). Recommendation: Every BOM generated SHOULD have a unique serial number, even if the contents have not changed. Use of serial numbers is recommended. This property is Optional.

version.description: The version of the BOM. Recommendation: Whenever an existing BOM is modified, the version of the BOM SHOULD be incremented by 1. When a system is presented with multiple BOMs with identical serial numbers, it SHOULD use the most recent version. This property is Optional.

metadata.description: Provides additional information about the BOM. This property is Optional.

components.description: A list of software, hardware, and data components. This property is Optional.

services.description: A list of services. This property is Optional.

externalReferences.description: Provides the ability to document external references to the BOM. This property is Optional. Each item MUST be an External Reference object.

dependencies.description: A dependency graph of components and services. This property is Optional. Each item MUST be a Dependency object. Components or services that do not have their own dependencies MUST be declared as empty elements within the graph.

compositions.description: Compositions describe the completeness of the BOM. This property is Optional. Each item MUST be a Compositions object.

vulnerabilities.description: A list of known vulnerabilities. This property is Optional. Each item MUST be a Vulnerability object.

annotations.description: Provides a mechanism to annotate the BOM with external information. This property is Optional. Each item MUST be an Annotations object.

formulation.description: Describes how the BOM was formulated. This property is Optional. Each item MUST be a Formula object.

declarations.description: The list of declarations which describe the conformance to standards. Each declaration may include attestations, claims, and evidence. This property is Optional.

definitions.description: A collection of reusable objects that are defined and may be used elsewhere in the BOM. This property is Optional.

properties.description: Provides the ability to add custom properties to the BOM. Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names of interest to the general public are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

signature.description: An enveloped signature in JSON Signature Format (JSF). This property is Optional. All items MUST be unique.

components.description: If the 'components' property is present, it MUST NOT be empty.

metadata.description: Provides additional information about a BOM.

timestamp.description: The date and time (UTC) when the BOM was created. This property is Optional.

lifecycles.description: The lifecycle phase(s). Each item MUST be a Lifecycle object. This property is Optional.

tools.description: The tool(s) used in the creation, enrichment, and validation of the BOM. The object MUST be one of 'Tools' or 'Tools (legacy)'. This property is Optional.

authors.description: The person(s) who created the BOM. Each item MUST be an Organizational Contact object. This property is Optional.

component.description: The component that the BOM describes. This property is Optional.

manufacturer.description: The organization that created the BOM. This property is Optional.

manufacture.description: [Deprecated] The organization that manufactured the component that the BOM describes. This property is Optional and Deprecated.

supplier.description: The organization that supplied the component that the BOM describes. This property is Optional.

licenses.description: The license information for the BOM document itself. This property is Optional.

properties.description: Provides the ability to add custom properties to the BOM metadata. Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names of interest to the general public are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

lifecycle.description: Describes a phase of the product lifecycle. The object MUST be one of 'Pre-Defined Phase' or 'Custom Phase'.

phase.description: A pre-defined phase in the product lifecycle. This property is Required.

name.description: The name of the custom lifecycle phase. This property is Required.

description.description: A description of the custom lifecycle phase. This property is Optional.

tools.description: A container for component and service tools used to create the BOM. This property is Optional.

components.description: A list of software and hardware components used as tools. Each item MUST be a Component object and all items MUST be unique.

services.description: A list of services used as tools. Each item MUST be a Service object and all items MUST be unique.

toolsLegacy.description: [Deprecated] A list of legacy tool objects used to create the BOM. Each item MUST be a Tool object. This property is Optional and Deprecated.

tool.description: [Deprecated] Information about an automated or manual tool used. Use 'component' or 'service' instead. This property is Optional and Deprecated.

vendor.description: The name of the vendor who created the tool. This property is Optional.

name.description: The name of the tool. This property is Optional.

version.description: The version of the tool. This property is Optional.

hashes.description: The hashes of the tool. Each item MUST be a Hash object. This property is Optional.

externalReferences.description: External references for the tool. Each item MUST be an External Reference object. This property is Optional.

hash.description: Specifies a cryptographic hash and its algorithm.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

url.description: The URL(s) of the organization. Each item MUST be a string.

contact.description: The contact(s) for the organization. Each item MUST be an Organizational Contact object.

organizationalContact.description: Defines a contact at an organization.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.
An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

name.description: The name of the property. This property is Required.

component.description: A software, hardware, or data component.

type.description: Specifies the type of component. This property is Required. Recommendations: For software components, classify as 'application' if no more specific appropriate classification is available. If a library has key features of a framework, it SHOULD be classified as a framework. If unknown, specifying 'library' is recommended. A hardware device containing firmware SHOULD include a component for the physical hardware and another for the firmware or operating system.

mime-type.description: The optional mime-type of the component. When used on file components, it can provide additional context. This property is Optional.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

supplier.description: The organization that supplied the component. The supplier may often be the manufacturer, but may also be a distributor or repackager. This property is Optional.

manufacturer.description: The organization that created the component. Manufacturer is common in components created through automated processes. Components created through manual means may have 'authors' instead. This property is Optional.

authors.description: The person(s) who created the component. Authors are common in components created through manual processes. Each item MUST be an Organizational Contact object. This property is Optional.

author.description: [Deprecated] The person(s) or organization(s) that authored the component. Use 'authors' or 'manufacturer' instead. This property is Optional and Deprecated.

publisher.description: The person(s) or organization(s) that published the component. This property is Optional.

group.description: The grouping name or identifier for the component. This will often be a shortened, single name of the company or project. Recommendation: Whitespace and special characters SHOULD be avoided. This property is Optional.

name.description: The name of the component. This will often be a shortened, single name of the component. This property is Required.

version.description: The component version. Recommendation: The version SHOULD ideally comply with semantic versioning but is not enforced. This property is Optional.

description.description: Specifies a description for the component. This property is Optional.

scope.description: Specifies the scope of the component. Recommendation: If scope is not specified, 'required' scope SHOULD be assumed by the consumer of the BOM. This property is Optional.

hashes.description: The hashes of the component. Each item of this array MUST be a Hash object. This property is Optional.

licenses.description: The license(s) of the component. The property MUST be one of: a list of licenses or a single SPDX License Expression. This property is Optional.

copyright.description: A copyright notice informing users of the underlying claims to copyright ownership in a published work. This property is Optional.

cpe.description: Asserts the identity of the component using CPE. The CPE MUST conform to the CPE 2.2 or 2.3 specification. This property is Optional.

purl.description: Asserts the identity of the component using package-url (purl). If specified, the purl MUST be valid and conform to the specification. This property is Optional.

omniborId.description: Asserts the identity of the component using the OmniBOR Artifact ID. If specified, the OmniBOR MUST be valid and conform to the specification. Each item MUST be a string. This property is Optional.

swhid.description: Asserts the identity of the component using the Software Heritage persistent identifier (SWHID). If specified, the SWHID MUST be valid and conform to the specification. Each item MUST be a string. This property is Optional.

swid.description: Asserts the identity of the component using ISO-IEC 19770-2 Software Identification (SWID) Tags. This property is Optional.

modified.description: [Deprecated] A boolean value indicating if the component has been modified from the original. Use the 'pedigree' element instead. This property is Optional and Deprecated.

pedigree.description: Component pedigree is a way to document complex supply chain scenarios. This property is Optional.

externalReferences.description: External references provide a way to document systems, sites, and information that may be relevant but are not included with the BOM. Each item MUST be an External Reference object. This property is Optional.

components.description: A list of software and hardware components included in the parent component. This is not a dependency tree but a hierarchical representation. All items MUST be unique. This property is Optional.

evidence.description: Provides the ability to document evidence collected through various forms of extraction or analysis. This property is Optional.

releaseNotes.description: Specifies optional release notes. This property is Optional.

modelCard.description: A model card describes the intended uses of a machine learning model. Recommendation: This object SHOULD be specified for any component of type 'machine-learning-model' and MUST NOT be specified for other component types. This property is Optional.

data.description: Describes the data contents of a component. Recommendation: This object SHOULD be specified for any component of type 'data' and MUST NOT be specified for other component types. This property is Optional.

assetType.description: The type of cryptographic asset. This property is Required. The assetType value MUST be one of the enumerated values.

primitive.description: The primitive value MUST be one of the enumerated values.

curve.description: Recommendation: Use curve names as defined at https://neuromancer.sk/std/.

executionEnvironment.description: The executionEnvironment value MUST be one of the enumerated values.

implementationPlatform.description: The implementationPlatform value MUST be one of the enumerated values.

certificationLevel.description: Each item MUST be a string and one of the enumerated values.

mode.description: The mode value MUST be one of the enumerated values.

padding.description: The padding value MUST be one of the enumerated values.

cryptoFunctions.description: Each item MUST be a string and one of the enumerated values.

type.description: The type value MUST be one of the enumerated values.

state.description: The state value MUST be one of the enumerated values.

type.description: The type value MUST be one of the enumerated values.

cipherSuites.description: Each item MUST be a Cipher Suite object.

cryptoRefArray.description: A list of protocol-related cryptographic assets. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

cryptoProperties.description: Cryptographic assets have properties that uniquely define them and that make them actionable for further reasoning. This property is Optional.

tags.description: Textual strings that aid in discovery, search, and retrieval of the associated object. Each item of this array MUST be a string. This property is Optional.

properties.description: Provides the ability to document properties in a name-value store. Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names of interest to the general public are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional. This property is Optional.

signature.description: An enveloped digital signature embedded within and specific to this object within the BOM. All items MUST be unique. This property is Optional.

service.description: Defines a service, which may include microservices, function-as-a-service, and other types of network or intra-process services.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

provider.description: The organization that provides the service. This property is Optional.

group.description: The grouping name, namespace, or identifier for the service. Recommendation: Whitespace and special characters SHOULD be avoided. This property is Optional.

name.description: The name of the service. This property is Required.

version.description: The service version. This property is Optional.

description.description: Specifies a description for the service. This property is Optional.

endpoints.description: The endpoint URIs of the service. Each item MUST be a string. This property is Optional.

authenticated.description: A boolean value indicating if the service requires authentication. This property is Optional.

x-trust-boundary.description: A boolean value indicating if use of the service crosses a trust zone or boundary. This property is Optional.

trustZone.description: The name of the trust zone the service resides in. This property is Optional.

data.description: Specifies information about the data including the directional flow and classification. This property is Optional.

licenses.description: The license(s) of the service. This property is Optional.

externalReferences.description: External references for the service. Each item MUST be an External Reference object. This property is Optional.

services.description: A list of services included or deployed behind the parent service. All items MUST be unique. This property is Optional.

releaseNotes.description: Specifies optional release notes for the service.

properties.description: Provides the ability to document properties in a name-value store. Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

tags.description: Textual strings that aid in discovery, search, and retrieval. Each item MUST be a string. This property is Optional.

signature.description: An enveloped digital signature specific to this service object. All items MUST be unique. This property is Optional.

externalReference.description: Provides a reference to an external document or resource.

url.description: The URI (URL or URN) to the external reference. This property is Required. The value MUST be a valid URI.

comment.description: An optional comment describing the external reference. This property is Optional.

type.description: Specifies the type of external reference. This property is Required.

hashes.description: The hashes of the external reference. Each item MUST be a Hash object. This property is Optional.

dependency.description: Defines the direct dependencies of a component or service.

ref.description: References a component or service by its bom-ref attribute. This property is Required.

dependsOn.description: The bom-ref identifiers of the components or services that are dependencies of this object. Each item MUST be a string, and all items MUST be unique. This property is Optional.

provides.description: The bom-ref identifiers of the components or services that define a given specification which are provided by this object. Each item MUST be a string, and all items MUST be unique. This property is Optional.

composition.description: Describes constituent parts and their completeness.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

aggregate.description: Specifies how complete a relationship is. This property is Required.

assemblies.description: The bom-ref identifiers of the components or services being described as assemblies. Each item MUST be a Ref or BOM-Link Element, and all items MUST be unique. This property is Optional.

dependencies.description: The bom-ref identifiers of the components or services being described as dependencies. Each item MUST be a string, and all items MUST be unique. This property is Optional.

vulnerabilities.description: The bom-ref identifiers of the vulnerabilities being described. Each item MUST be a string, and all items MUST be unique. This property is Optional.

signature.description: An optional digital signature for the composition. All items MUST be unique.

vulnerability.description: Defines a weakness in a component or service that could be exploited or triggered by a threat source.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

id.description: The identifier that uniquely identifies the vulnerability (e.g., CVE, GHSA). This property is Optional.

source.description: The source that published the vulnerability. This property is Optional.

references.description: Pointers to equivalent vulnerabilities in other intelligence sources. This property is Optional.

ratings.description: A list of vulnerability ratings. Each item MUST be a Rating object. This property is Optional.

cwes.description: A list of Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE) codes. Each item MUST be an integer with a minimum value of 1. This property is Optional.

description.description: A description of the vulnerability as provided by the source. This property is Optional.

detail.description: An in-depth description of the vulnerability. Recommendation: If a vulnerability is not exploitable, this field SHOULD include specific details on why it is not impacted. This property is Optional.

recommendation.description: Recommendations of how the vulnerability can be remediated or mitigated. This property is Optional.

workaround.description: A bypass, usually temporary, of the vulnerability. This property is Optional.

proofOfConcept.description: Evidence used to reproduce the vulnerability. This property is Optional.

advisories.description: Published advisories of the vulnerability. Each item MUST be an Advisory object. This property is Optional.

created.description: The date and time the vulnerability record was created in the vulnerability database. This property is Optional.

published.description: The date and time the vulnerability record was first published. This property is Optional.

updated.description: The date and time the vulnerability record was last updated. This property is Optional.

rejected.description: The date and time the vulnerability record was rejected (if applicable). This property is Optional.

credits.description: Individuals or organizations credited with the discovery of the vulnerability. This property is Optional.

tools.description: The tool(s) used to identify, confirm, or score the vulnerability. The object MUST be one of 'Tools' or 'Tools (legacy)'. This property is Optional.

analysis.description: An assessment of the impact and exploitability of the vulnerability. This property is Optional.

affects.description: The components or services that are affected by the vulnerability. This property is Optional.

properties.description: Custom properties for the vulnerability. Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

annotation.description: A comment, note, explanation, or similar textual content.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

subjects.description: The object in the BOM identified by its bom-ref. Each subject MUST be any of: Ref, BOM-Link Element. All items MUST be unique.

annotator.description: The entity which created the annotation. The object MUST be one of: Organizational Entity, Organizational Contact, Component, or Service.

timestamp.description: The date and time (timestamp) when the annotation was created. This property is Required.

text.description: The textual content of the annotation. This property is Required.

signature.description: An optional digital signature of the annotation. All items MUST be unique.

formula.description: Describes workflows and resources of a component or service. Each item MUST be a Formula object.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

properties.description: Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object.

declarations.description: The list of declarations which describe the conformance to standards.

assessors.description: The list of assessors. Each item MUST be an Assessor object.

attestations.description: The list of attestations. Each item MUST be an Attestation object.

claims.description: The list of claims. Each item MUST be a Claim object.

evidence.description: The list of evidence. Each item MUST be an Evidence object.

definitions.description: A collection of reusable objects (standards, levels, etc.).

standards.description: The list of standards. Each item MUST be a Standard object.

id.description: An identifier that uniquely identifies the vulnerability. This property is Required.

source.description: The source that published the vulnerability. This property is Required.

url.description: Location where the advisory can be obtained. This property is Required.

organizations.description: The organizations credited with vulnerability discovery. Each item MUST be an Organizational Entity object.

individuals.description: The individuals credited with vulnerability discovery. Each item MUST be an Organizational Contact object.

state.description: Recommendation: Justification SHOULD be specified for all 'not_affected' cases.

response.description: Recommendation: Responses are strongly encouraged for vulnerabilities where the analysis state is exploitable. Each item MUST be a string.

detail.description: Recommendation: If a vulnerability is not exploitable, the detail field SHOULD include specific details on why the component or service is not impacted.

ref.description: References a component or service by its bom-ref attribute. This property is Required. The property MUST be any of: Ref or BOM-Link Element.

versions.description: Zero or more individual versions or range of versions. All items MUST be unique.

signature.title: JSON Signature Format
signature.description: An enveloped signature in JSON Signature Format (JSF) as defined by the JSF specification. See https://cyberphone.github.io/doc/security/jsf.html for details.

aliases.description: Each item MUST be a string.

tags.description: Each item MUST be a string.

resolves.description: Each item MUST be an Issue object.

notes.description: Each item MUST be a Note object.

properties.description: Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

text.description: The content of the note. This property is Required.

modelCard.description: The model card for a machine learning model component.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

properties.description: Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

modelParameters.description: Parameters of the machine learning model.

datasets.description: Datasets used in the model. Each item MUST be one of 'Inline Data Information' or 'Data Reference'.

inputs.description: Input parameters. Each item MUST be an Input and Output Parameters object.

outputs.description: Output parameters. Each item MUST be an Input and Output Parameters object.

inlineDataInformation.description: Information about inline data. The type property is Required.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

type.description: The type of data. This property is Required.

properties.description: Configuration properties. Each item MUST be a Lightweight name-value pair object. Recommendation: Property names are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy. Formal registration is optional.

sensitiveData.description: A list of sensitive data types. Each item MUST be a string.

users.description: Who are the intended users of the model?

useCases.description: What are the intended use cases of the model?

technicalLimitations.description: What are the known technical limitations of the model?

performanceTradeoffs.description: What are the known tradeoffs in accuracy/performance of the model?

ethicalConsiderations.description: What are the ethical risks involved in the application of this model?

environmentalConsiderations.description: What are the various environmental impacts the corresponding machine learning model has exhibited across its lifecycle?

fairnessAssessments.description: How does the model affect groups at risk of being systematically disadvantaged?

energyConsumptions.description: Describes energy consumption information incurred for one or more component lifecycle activities.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.
An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

type.description: The type of data. This property is Required.

sensitiveData.description: A list of sensitive data types. Each item MUST be a string.

securedBy.description: The mechanism by which the cryptographic asset is secured.

algorithms.description: A list of algorithms related to the cipher suite. Each item MUST be a string.

identifiers.description: A list of common identifiers for the cipher suite. Each item MUST be a string.

encr.description: Encryption Algorithm (ENCR). Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

prf.description: Pseudorandom Function (PRF). Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

integ.description: Integrity Algorithm (INTEG). Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

ke.description: Key Exchange Method (KE). Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

auth.description: IKEv2 Authentication method. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'. Each item MUST be a string.

licenseChoice.description: A list of licenses or a single SPDX license expression. The value MUST be an array.

oneOf.description: A list of one or more licenses.

licenses.description: EITHER (list of SPDX licenses and/or named licenses) OR (tuple of one SPDX License Expression)

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

proofOfConcept.description: Evidence used to reproduce the vulnerability.

reproductionSteps.description: Precise steps to reproduce the vulnerability.

environment.description: A description of the environment in which reproduction was possible.

supportingMaterial.description: Supporting material that helps in reproducing or understanding how reproduction is possible.

bom-ref.description: An optional identifier. Every bom-ref MUST be unique. Recommendation: Value SHOULD NOT start with 'urn:cdx:'.

version.description: A single version identifier for a component or service.

hash-alg.description: The algorithm that generated the hash value.
